ford_edge_job_note_df2f0fc26a.text: The UK Edge was principally supplied with passive start. Use a European 433 MHz application, not a North American 315 MHz key. The Ford master workbook records OEM references 1919602 and 2230771 for the UK 2016-2021 slim smart-key family.

verification.notes: Duplicate wording is collapsed in this index. Each note remains traceable to the verified generation-specific records in models.json.
